narrative:
Miamisburg 2-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,167 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
